findings.title: Paging .limit(200) on unbounded Horizon history
findings.description: Probe F detected .limit(200).order(desc=False) on Horizon history without cursor; production cardinality is unbounded years of data.
findings.fix: Use cursor-paged iteration with an explicit upper bound.
findings.eligible_reason: paging call .limit(200) detected on Horizon history without cursor at reconcile.py:87
